faqs.question: What types of spiders are commonly found in Pomonok apartments?
faqs.answer: Pomonok residents most frequently encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders. These spiders typically enter through gaps around windows, doors, and utility penetrations common in older apartment buildings. While most are harmless, they can multiply quickly and create unsightly webs throughout your living space.
